title: Potion Indication
description: Redstone darkens the potion, glowstone brightens it. -No mods required.
body:
**Its a simple pack**
- Redstone darkens the potion, glowstone brightens it.
- Also changed the cork to match the redstone and glowstone.

**If you are using my [archeryrevamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/archeryrevamped) pack make sure that this pack is belowe that.**
<details>
<summary>Click for Credits</summary>
  
[-Thanos](https://modrinth.com/user/thanos) 
- I realised that in his visuals pack strong tipped arrows were darker and here we are now.
- Check out [Visuals](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visuals) if you are a fan of vanilla like textures.

</details>
